introSection: Erli's Seifenkiste (English: Erli's Soapbox) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Steinau in Steinau an der Straße, Hesse, Germany. Erli is the park mascot.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Erli's Seifenkiste (English: Erli's Soapbox) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Steinau in Steinau an der Straße, Hesse, Germany. Erli is the park mascot.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
